title: Chat and AI Integration
description: Sending chat messages, interacting with AI providers, and managing chat sessions

use_cases.name: List Available Chat Models
use_cases.notes: Filtered: excludes 'costly', 'fake', 'abuse', 'model-fallback-test-1'. Runs via SUService sudo.

use_cases.name: Get Chat Model Details
use_cases.notes: Returns full IChatModel objects with cost/capability info.

use_cases.name: Complete AI Chat Request
use_cases.notes: Core use case. Includes model resolution, moderation, credit check, provider dispatch, streaming, fallback.

use_cases.name: Moderate Chat Content
use_cases.notes: Calls checkModeration(); falls back from OpenAI to Claude. Skipped for Ollama and test mode.

use_cases.name: Check & Enforce Credit Limits
use_cases.notes: hasEnoughCredits(), getRemainingUsage(). Applies max_tokens cap based on available credits.

use_cases.name: Enforce Concurrent Request Limits
use_cases.notes: Per-actor, per-subscription tier limits. default:3, user_free:5. 2-min lease.

use_cases.name: Fallback to Alternate Model/Provider
use_cases.notes: On provider error: tries same model on different provider, then euclidean-distance closest model. Max 4 attempts. Redis-cached fallback list.

use_cases.name: Register AI Providers
use_cases.notes: On boot.consolidation. Registers Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Groq, DeepSeek, Mistral, xAI, OpenRouter, TogetherAI, Ollama, FakeChat. EventService extensible.

use_cases.name: Complete Chat via OpenRouter
use_cases.notes: Uses OpenAI SDK with baseURL=https://openrouter.ai/api/v1. Handles max_tokens context-length errors with retry. Custom usage/cost accounting.

use_cases.name: Fetch OpenRouter Model Catalog
use_cases.notes: GET /models via axios. Cached in KV store (key: openrouterChat:models). Applies OPEN_ROUTER_MODEL_OVERRIDES. Strips openrouter/auto.

use_cases.name: Stream Chat Response
use_cases.notes: Returns TypedValue stream (application/x-ndjson, chunked). AIChatStream wraps PassThrough. Concurrent permit released in finally_fn.

use_cases.name: Record Usage / Metering
use_cases.notes: Tracks prompt, completion, input_cache_read, request tokens. If OpenRouter provides cost field, uses that directly (billedUsage in microcents).

key_relationships: AIChatService uses IChatProvider (strategy pattern, #providers map keyed by name)
AIChatService uses MeteringService (credit checks, usage recording)
OpenRouterProvider uses OpenAI SDK (openai npm) + axios
AIChatService IMPLEMENTS driver interface puter-chat-completion: {models, list, complete}

methods: checkModeration(text: string): Promise<{flagged: boolean, results: ModerationCreateResponse}>

important_notes: ChatAPIService mounts at /puterai — public, unauthenticated endpoints for model listing
Moderation skipped for Ollama provider and in test_mode
Suspended users and unconfirmed emails are blocked in AIChatService.complete()
subscriberOnly models gated by metering:getUserSubscription event
OpenRouter models prefixed with 'openrouter:' in id; aliases include bare model id, name, 'openrouter/<id>'
Fallback logic: same model/different provider first, then euclidean price-distance model; max 4 attempts
PuterAPIService installs general platform API routes (auth, kvstore, drivers, etc.) — not chat-specific
